LanguageData.Ammo_545x39mmSoviet_Teseum.label: 5.45x39mm Soviet cartridge (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_545x39mmSoviet_Teseum.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of assault rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleIntermediate_Teseum.label: intermediate rifle cartridge (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleIntermediate_Teseum.descriptio: Intermediate power rifle ammunition, used mainly by assault rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_545x39mmSoviet_Teseum.label: 5.45mm Soviet bullet (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x54mmR_Teseum.label: 7.62x54mmR cartridge (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_762x54mmR_Teseum.description: Rimmed rifle cartridge used by numerous machine guns, bolt-action rifles, and other weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_Rifle_Teseum.label: rifle cartridge (Teseum)
LanguageData.Ammo_Rifle_Teseum.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles and battle rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_762x54mmR_Teseum.label: 7.62mmR bullet (Teseum)
